---
title: "Characterizing and Predicting Progression Trajectories"
author: 
  - "Jaime Ñíguez"
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    formats: ipynb,Rmd  
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.11.2
  kernelspec:
    display_name: R
    language: R
    name: ir
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

# Predicting Progression 

```{r eval=FALSE}

# FUNCIÓN UNIFICADA PARA PREDICCIÓN DE CLUSTERS
evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  covariates_data = NULL,
  clinical_covar = NULL,
  score_type = c("Motor", "Non_Motor"),  # Nuevo parámetro para seleccionar dominio
  k = 3,
  test_size = 0.2,
  n_bootstrap = 10,
  n_cores = 2,
  mtry_select = c(60, 30, 10),
  splitrule_select = "gini",
  min.node.size_select = 10,
  ntrees_select = 500
) {
  # Validar parámetro score_type
  score_type <- match.arg(score_type)
  
  # Determinar columna de score basado en el tipo
  score_column <- switch(score_type,
    "Motor" = "Motor_Score_raw_percentile",
    "Non_Motor" = "Non_Motor_Score_raw_percentile"
  )
  
  # Librerías necesarias
  require(caret)
  require(doParallel)
  require(dplyr)
  require(tidyr)
  require(ranger)
  require(foreach)
  require(tibble)
  
  registerDoParallel(cores = n_cores)
  
  # ---- 1. Preparar datos de expresión ----
  PPMI_exp_M0_id <- expression_data %>%
    mutate(
      sample_id = rownames(.),
      participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-sample_id)
  
  # ---- 2. Preparar datos clínicos si se proporcionan ----
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_data)) {
    covariates_processed <- covariates_data %>%
      mutate(participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id))) %>%
      select(participant_id, sample_id, all_of(clinical_covar)) %>%
      distinct()
  } else {
    covariates_processed <- NULL
  }

  # ---- 3. Clustering sobre el score seleccionado ----
  df_long <- severity_scores[, c("participant_id", "Visit", score_column)]
  df_long_cluster <- df_long[order(df_long$participant_id, df_long$Visit), ]
  
  df_wide <- pivot_wider(
    df_long_cluster,
    names_from = Visit,
    values_from = all_of(score_column),
    names_prefix = "Visit_"
  )
  
  df_diff <- df_wide %>%
    mutate(
      S0 = Visit_0,
      diff_0_12 = Visit_12 - Visit_0,
      diff_12_24 = Visit_24 - Visit_12,
      diff_24_36 = Visit_36 - Visit_24
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(participant_id, S0, diff_0_12, diff_12_24, diff_24_36)
  
  # Escalado y filtrado de variables constantes
  data_to_scale <- df_diff[, -1]
  removed_vars <- names(data_to_scale)[apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) == 0]
  if (length(removed_vars) > 0) {
    cat("Variables sin variación:", removed_vars, "\n")
  }
  
  data_filtered <- data_to_scale[, apply(data_to_scale, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE) != 0]
  data_scaled <- scale(data_filtered)
  
  # Clustering k-means
  set.seed(123)
  km_cluster <- kmeans(data_scaled, k, nstart = 25)
  df_diff$cluster <- factor(km_cluster$cluster)
  
  cluster_df <- df_diff %>%
    select(participant_id, cluster) %>%
    mutate(cluster = make.names(cluster))
  
  # ---- 4. Filtrado de genes altamente correlacionados ----
  cor_matrix <- cor(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id))
  cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
  high_cor <- cor_long %>% filter(Freq > 0.95, Var1 != Var2)
  genes_to_remove <- unique(c(high_cor$Var1, high_cor$Var2))
  genes_remaining <- setdiff(colnames(PPMI_exp_M0_id %>% select(-participant_id)), genes_to_remove)
  
  PPMI_exp_selected <- PPMI_exp_M0_id %>%
    select(participant_id, all_of(genes_remaining)) %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id")
  
  # ---- 5. Construcción del dataset final ----
  df_model <- PPMI_exp_selected %>%
    inner_join(cluster_df, by = "participant_id")
  
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar) && !is.null(covariates_processed)) {
    df_model <- df_model %>%
      inner_join(covariates_processed %>% select(-participant_id), by = "sample_id")
  }
  
  df_model <- df_model %>%
    select(-c(sample_id, participant_id)) %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster))
  
  # Transformar covariable si es binaria
  if (!is.null(clinical_covar)) {
    if (is.factor(df_model[[clinical_covar]]) || is.character(df_model[[clinical_covar]])) {
      levels_cov <- unique(na.omit(df_model[[clinical_covar]]))
      if (length(levels_cov) == 2) {
        df_model[[clinical_covar]] <- ifelse(df_model[[clinical_covar]] == levels_cov[1], 0, 1)
      } else {
        stop("La covariable categórica tiene más de 2 niveles (excluyendo NA).")
      }
    } else {
      message(paste0("La covariable '", clinical_covar, "' ya es numérica."))
    }
  }

  # ---- 6. Split train/test ----
  set.seed(123)
  train_idx <- createDataPartition(df_model$cluster, p = 1 - test_size, list = FALSE)
  train_data <- df_model[train_idx, ]
  test_data  <- df_model[-train_idx, ]
  
  tune_grid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = mtry_select,
    splitrule = splitrule_select,
    min.node.size = min.node.size_select
  )

  # ---- 7. Bootstrap interno para tuning ----
  cat("Iniciando bootstrap interno para selección de hiperparámetros...\n")
  bootstrap_tuning <- foreach(i = 1:n_bootstrap, .combine = rbind,
                              .packages = c("ranger", "caret", "dplyr")) %dopar% {
    tryCatch({
      idx <- sample(1:nrow(train_data), replace = TRUE)
      train_boot <- train_data[idx, ]
      oob_idx <- setdiff(1:nrow(train_data), unique(idx))
      test_boot <- train_data[oob_idx, ]
      
      rf_tune <- train(
        x = train_boot %>% select(-cluster),
        y = train_boot$cluster,
        method = "ranger",
        metric = "Accuracy",
        tuneGrid = tune_grid,
        trControl = trainControl(method = "cv", number = 3),
        num.trees = ntrees_select,
        importance = "permutation",
        always.split.variables = clinical_covar
      )
      
      best <- rf_tune$bestTune
      
      if (nrow(test_boot) > 0) {
        pred <- predict(rf_tune, newdata = test_boot)
        acc <- confusionMatrix(pred, test_boot$cluster)$overall["Accuracy"]
      } else {
        acc <- NA
      }
      
      data.frame(
        bootstrap = i,
        mtry = best$mtry,
        splitrule = best$splitrule,
        min.node.size = best$min.node.size,
        Accuracy = acc
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      data.frame(bootstrap = i, mtry = NA, splitrule = NA, min.node.size = NA, Accuracy = NA)
    })
  }

  # ---- 8. Seleccionar mejor conjunto de hiperparámetros ----
  best_params <- bootstrap_tuning %>%
    group_by(mtry, splitrule, min.node.size) %>%
    summarise(MeanAcc = mean(Accuracy, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(MeanAcc)) %>%
    slice(1)

  cat("Mejores hiperparámetros seleccionados:\n")
  print(best_params)

  # ---- 9. Entrenamiento final ----
  rf_final <- ranger(
    formula = cluster ~ .,
    data = train_data,
    mtry = best_params$mtry,
    splitrule = best_params$splitrule,
    min.node.size = best_params$min.node.size,
    num.trees = ntrees_select,
    importance = "permutation",
    always.split.variables = clinical_covar
  )

  # ---- 10. Evaluación final ----
  pred_final <- predict(rf_final, data = test_data)$predictions
  final_cm <- confusionMatrix(pred_final, test_data$cluster)

  if (is.matrix(final_cm$byClass)) {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- mean(final_cm$byClass[,"Sensitivity"], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    balanced_accuracy_test <- final_cm$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"]
  }

  # ---- 11. IC 95% de métricas bootstrap ----
  acc_values <- na.omit(bootstrap_tuning$Accuracy)
  acc_ci <- quantile(acc_values, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)

  # ---- 12. Importancia de variables ----
  var_imp <- tibble::enframe(rf_final$variable.importance, name = "Variable", value = "Importance") %>%
    arrange(desc(Importance))

  # ---- 13. Resultado final ----
  list(
    ScoreType = score_type,
    K = k,
    BestParams = best_params,
    FinalModel = rf_final,
    FinalConfusionMatrix = final_cm,
    BalancedAccuracyTest = balanced_accuracy_test,
    BootstrapTuning = bootstrap_tuning,
    AccuracyCI95 = acc_ci,
    VariableImportance = var_imp
  )
}

# FUNCIÓN PARA EJECUTAR MÚLTIPLES EXPERIMENTOS
run_multiple_experiments <- function(
  severity_scores,
  expression_data,
  score_type = c("Motor", "Non_Motor"),
  k_range = 2:7,
  n_boots = 25,
  n_cores = 4,
  save_prefix = "progression_prediction_RF"
) {
  
  score_type <- match.arg(score_type)
  results_list <- list()
  
  for (k in k_range) {
    cat("Ejecutando experimento para", score_type, "k =", k, "\n")
    
    result <- evaluate_clusters_with_covariate_ranger(
      severity_scores = severity_scores,
      expression_data = expression_data,
      covariates_data = NULL,
      clinical_covar = NULL,
      score_type = score_type,
      k = k,
      test_size = 0.2,
      n_bootstrap = n_boots,
      n_cores = n_cores
    )
    
    # Guardar resultado individual
    filename <- paste0(save_prefix, "_k", k, "_", score_type, "_reactome.rds")
    saveRDS(result, filename)
    
    results_list[[paste0("k", k)]] <- result
    
    # Mostrar resumen
    cat("Resultados para k =", k, ":\n")
    print(result$FinalConfusionMatrix$overall["Accuracy"])
    cat("---\n")
  }
  
  return(results_list)
}

# GUARDAR DATOS DE ENTRADA
saveRDS(severity_scores, "severity_scores_for_pred_K")
saveRDS(PPMI_exp_M0, "PPMI_exp_M0_for_pred_K")

# EJECUTAR EXPERIMENTOS PARA MOTOR
cat("=== EJECUTANDO EXPERIMENTOS PARA MOTOR ===\n")
motor_results <- run_multiple_experiments(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  score_type = "Motor",
  k_range = 2:5,
  n_boots = 25,
  n_cores = 4,
  save_prefix = "progression_prediction_RF"
)

# EJECUTAR EXPERIMENTOS PARA NON-MOTOR
cat("=== EJECUTANDO EXPERIMENTOS PARA NON-MOTOR ===\n")
non_motor_results <- run_multiple_experiments(
  severity_scores = severity_scores,
  expression_data = PPMI_exp_M0,
  score_type = "Non_Motor",
  k_range = 2:7,
  n_boots = 25,
  n_cores = 4,
  save_prefix = "progression_prediction_RF"
)


```
